positive: Minimalist woodland creature silhouette, highly detailed fox and owl perched on a crescent moon branch. The style is clean vector art combined with vintage engraving elements, using deep forest greens, earthy browns, and pops of metallic gold for accent. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed for seamless apparel repeat or single print. Strong high-contrast contrast between the subject and a muted, cream-colored background. Focus on sharp edges, clean linework, and excellent silhouette definition. Cinematic studio lighting, perfect symmetry, print-ready resolution.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, grainy, bokeh, messy, busy background, photorealistic, gradient background
